{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":85433},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7008592254206165796","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了30年小说了，从古龙金庸到温瑞安柳残阳，席慕容琼瑶也有涉猎，闲来无事下载个番茄打发时光，也就是偶尔无聊随便翻翻，翻到此书时，也无非点进来随便看看，但是几章节便让老夫欲罢不能了，可能是跟我年龄有关，看着看着就入戏了，全文无尿点，文笔流畅，人物刻画真实且细腻，故事框架有血有肉，符合年代，不夸张，不捏造！强烈推荐吧！👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631815074,"group_id":"6901924870733433863","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzOG/nEYAbrFyjzmSU9ARBRREP6BYydQm5fjyWuYPYQt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776700848\u0026x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"1261836428642823","user_name":"爱吃香菜饺子的熊武"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1261836428642823","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6901924870733433863","book_info":{"abstract":"（实体书在京东商城上线啦，内容经过精修更加精彩，目前优惠多多，喜欢的朋友速去抢购哦）上市执行总裁周于峰意外重回1983年，这是一个计划经济、摸着石头过河的年代，面对想要离婚的娇妻，生活艰难的弟弟、妹妹，且看他翻手为云、手为雨、纵横商海，改变未来格局！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/545d086507d82dbd4f70d3021dc9909e","author":"恩怨各一半","author_id":"","book_id":"6901924870733433863","book_name":"重生：回到1983当富翁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026gen 爽点处理的很棒，短短几十章，对于矛盾处理先抑后扬，再抑再扬，张弛有度，主角智商在线，配角也有血有肉，很多配角都有自己的想法。\n
